scripts.test:auth: node --input-type=module -e "import { runAuthSmoke, formatAuthResult } from '@caistech/portfolio-gate/smoke/auth.js'; const r = await runAuthSmoke({baseUrl: process.env.TEST_BASE_URL || 'http://localhost:3000', loginPath: '/login', signupPath: '/signup', forgotPasswordPath: '/forgot-password', magicLinkPath: '/login', loginActionPath: '/api/auth/login', signupActionPath: '/api/auth/signup', forgotPasswordActionPath: '/api/auth/forgot', magicLinkActionPath: '/api/auth/magic-link'}); console.log(formatAuthResult(r)); process.exit(r.passed ? 0 : 1)"
scripts.test:auth:ci: node --input-type=module -e "import { runAuthSmoke, formatAuthResult } from '@caistech/portfolio-gate/smoke/auth.js'; const r = await runAuthSmoke({baseUrl: process.env.TEST_BASE_URL, loginPath: '/login', signupPath: '/signup', forgotPasswordPath: '/forgot-password', magicLinkPath: '/login', loginActionPath: '/api/auth/login', signupActionPath: '/api/auth/signup', forgotPasswordActionPath: '/api/auth/forgot', magicLinkActionPath: '/api/auth/magic-link'}); console.log(formatAuthResult(r)); process.exit(r.passed ? 0 : 1)"
scripts.test:routes: node --input-type=module -e "import { runRouteSmoke, formatRouteResult } from '@caistech/portfolio-gate/smoke/routes.js'; import { loadRoutesConfigJson } from '@caistech/portfolio-gate/smoke/routes.js'; const config = await loadRoutesConfigJson('./routes.config.json'); config.baseUrl = process.env.TEST_BASE_URL || 'http://localhost:3000'; const r = await runRouteSmoke(config); console.log(formatRouteResult(r)); process.exit(r.passed ? 0 : 1)"
scripts.test:session: node --input-type=module -e "import { runAuthSessionSmoke, formatSessionResult } from '@caistech/portfolio-gate/smoke/session.js'; const r = await runAuthSessionSmoke({baseUrl: process.env.TEST_BASE_URL || 'http://localhost:3000', loginPath: '/login', loginActionPath: '/api/auth/login', protectedRoutes: ['/dashboard'], testEmail: process.env.TEST_EMAIL || '', testPassword: process.env.TEST_PASSWORD || ''}); console.log(formatSessionResult(r)); process.exit(r.passed ? 0 : 1)"
scripts.test:smoke: npm run test:auth && npm run test:routes
